title: Knowledge Atom
description: The minimum complete semantic unit of knowledge. Every atom is self-contained, traceable to source, and carries full semantic content including conditions and exceptions.

atom_id.description: Deterministic ID: 'AT-' + SHA256(canonical_statement + scope + time_scope_valid_from)[:8-12]. Same semantic input produces same ID.

atom_type.description: The 32 valid atom types. See ATOM-TYPE-TAXONOMY.yaml for full definitions and decision tree.

canonical_statement.description: The complete semantic payload. Must be independently comprehensible. Carries all conditions, negations, and exceptions that are part of the knowledge.

full_semantic_content.description: Optional extended context, elaborations, or supporting detail that doesn't fit in canonical_statement.

title.description: Optional short descriptive title for human readability. Not used for ID generation.

knowledge_status.description: Lifecycle status. New atoms start as 'candidate'. Superseded atoms retain their original ID but link forward.

authority_level.description: Trust level. Default CANDIDATE_ONLY. Promotion requires explicit review, never automatic.

gpt_access.description: GPT readability. Default FULL_SEMANTIC_ACCESS for authorized candidate atoms.

transport_visibility.description: Who can see this atom in transit/storage.

privacy_class.description: Nature of the knowledge. Does NOT control storage (use storage_targets) or transport (use transport_visibility). CREDENTIAL_VALUE and FINANCIAL_VALUE are permanently denied from all outputs.

storage_targets.description: Where this atom is stored. Independent of privacy_class.

version.description: Semantic version of this atom. Changes on content update.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 last modification timestamp. Excluded from semantic hash.

confidence_basis.description: Evidence, reasoning, or authority behind the confidence level. MANDATORY — never assign confidence without basis.

scope.description: Domain, context, or system where this knowledge applies.

conditions.description: Conditions under which this atom is true. Empty array means unconditional.

exceptions.description: Known exceptions where this atom does NOT hold.

relations.description: Relations to other atoms. See KnowledgeRelation schema.

supersedes.description: Atom ID that this atom supersedes.

superseded_by.description: Atom ID that supersedes this atom.

digest_run_id.description: The digestion run that produced this atom. Links to AtomizationRunManifest.

extraction_decision_id.description: Link to the AtomizationDecision that documents why/how this atom was extracted.

semantic_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical_statement + scope + time_scope.valid_from + concatenated source_ids. Deterministic for same semantic input. Excludes created_at and updated_at.
